topic: Reactivity, catalysts, moles & implications — hydrogen production
image_prompt: Mis-crop: only question prose and answer text boxes (Q2d explain + Q3a outline). No diagram.

topic: States of matter, data analysis & hypothesis — frozen desserts
image_prompt: SVG: four frozen-dessert info cards (Kulfi/India, Paletas/Mexico, Ice cream/UK, Mochi/Japan) with illustrated dessert icons and country/name/ingredient labels, plus before/after-freezing draw boxes and water-molecule key.

render_data.title: Water molecules before and after freezing
render_data.before: Liquid: irregular arrangement of at least 10 water molecules, fairly close together with some in contact but not all touching, sliding past one another.
render_data.after: Solid (ice): regular/ordered arrangement of at least 10 water molecules, all in contact in a fixed lattice, vibrating about fixed positions.

topic: Measure ice crystal size from SEM image
image_prompt: SVG: SEM-style greyscale micrograph of ice crystals (rounded polygonal cells), labelled A and 'ice crystals' with green arrows and a 20 µm scale bar.
SVG: labelled materials on a counter — salt bottle, bowl of mixture, measuring cup, small/large freezer bags, ice cube tray (Ice), and gloves.
Mis-crop: only Q4e prose and If/Then/Because answer text boxes. No diagram.
SVG: short de-icing narrative panels plus the apparatus — two test tubes in stands, one holding crushed ice and one holding a single ice cube, labelled 'Crushed ice' and 'Ice cube'.

SVG: clean ruled data table of Substance / Trial / Initial ice mass / Remaining ice / % remaining / % melted for Salt, Sugar and Coffee powder, with two shaded blank cells for the student to calculate.

SVG: freezing-point infographic on a vertical thermometer scale (0 to -50 °C) with labelled de-icer chemicals — Urea -11.9, NaCl -21.0, Calcium magnesium acetate (C8H12CaMgO8) -27.5, MgCl2 -33.0, CaCl2 -51.0 °C — each with a molecule/formula bubble.
SVG: two greyscale micrographs side by side — 'Natural snow' (dendritic six-fold ice crystals) vs 'Machine-made snow' (rounded balls of ice).

topic: Hazard symbol on strontium chloride bottle
image_prompt: SVG: a labelled reagent bottle (green cap) of Strontium chloride displaying a red-diamond GHS skull-and-crossbones (toxic) hazard symbol.
SVG: simplified polyester condensation reaction — n diacid (HO-CO-block-CO-OH) + n diol (HO-block-OH) -> polyester repeat unit with ester linkages + 2n H2O, with A/B/C/D labels over the molecules.
SVG: six fabric property cards (Cotton, Silk, Satin, Velvet, Polyester, Nylon) each listing fibre type, breathability % and comfort % pie charts, wrinkle resistance, function, machine wash and cost.

topic: Cotton vs reclaimed clothing process infographic
image_prompt: SVG: two-column process infographic comparing new cotton clothing (Grow cotton -> transport -> blend/card/spin) with reclaimed clothing (collect -> sort -> dye removal -> break into fibres), merging into shared blue steps (transport to mills, sewn, sold), with simple machine/forklift/sewing icons.
